items.title: Notre Dame Fencing Wins 2026 Men’s National Championship
items.summary: When the NCAA spit the fenching national championsship back to men’s and women’s from the co-ed format they had — do you think they thought about doubling up Notre Dame’s national championship trophies from here to kingdom com? They should, because male or female — Notre Dame keeps winning the ship. Notre Dame Fencing: NATIONAL […]

items.title: NCAA TOURNAMENT: Notre Dame takes care of Farfield, 79-60
items.summary: Notre Dame will advance to the round of 32 after beating the Fairfield Stags in the first round, 79-60. To be honest, the game was never really in doubt for Notre Dame, but they kind of slow rolled themselves into halftime. Hannah Hidalgo was incredible, and despite not getting a double double — she did […]

items.title: Everything you need to know about Notre Dame’s first spring practice
items.summary: Notre Dame began its spring practice season for football to the delight of many. Obviously it’s just the first day of practice, many (many) players are either out or limited, and it’s not full contact yet as they were in helmets and shells. Taking too much away from the first day is dangerous to anyone’s […]

items.title: Notre Dame Women Win 2026 NCAA Fencing National Championship
items.summary: Notre Dame remains a fencing school after bringing home (while being at home) another NCAA National Championship. Notre Dame Wins 2026 NCAA Women’s Fencing Championship CHARLOTTE, N.C. (theACC.com) – The Notre Dame women’s fencing program won the 2026 NCAA Women’s Fencing Championship on Friday, March 20, at the Joyce Center in South Bend, Indiana. This marks […]

items.title: EARNED 5-STAR PODCAST: Notre Dame Football spring prep could use more hot dogs
items.summary: Joshua, Jude, and Brendan are a group of hungry bears, and are waking up from some winter hibernation for gas station hot dogs and the start of Notre Dame Football’s spring practice season.
